# Architecture — deckhouse-helm-generator

<!-- Generated by project-init on 2026-03-27. Type: development -->
<!-- Update this document when making architectural decisions -->

## 1. Context

### Purpose
CLI tool (dhg) for automatic generation of Helm charts and Deckhouse module scaffolding from existing Kubernetes manifests. Analyzes resource types, detects patterns, and produces production-ready Helm chart structures.

### Actors

| Actor | Role | Interface |
|-------|------|-----------|
| Developer | Runs dhg to generate Helm charts from K8s manifests | CLI (`dhg generate`, `dhg analyze`) |
| CI/CD | Runs dhg as part of release pipeline | CLI / shell |
| GoReleaser | Builds and publishes binary releases | `.goreleaser.yml` |

### Scope

- **In scope**: Helm chart generation from K8s YAML, resource analysis, multi-cloud annotations, air-gapped support, Kustomize overlays, monorepo layout, Deckhouse module scaffolding
- **Out of scope**: Helm chart deployment, Kubernetes cluster management, runtime configuration

## 2. Components / Areas

### Overview

| Component | Purpose | Owner | Status |
|-----------|---------|-------|--------|
| `cmd/dhg` | CLI entry point, Cobra commands | core | active |
| `pkg/analyzer` | Resource analysis engine, pattern detection | core | active |
| `pkg/extractor` | K8s manifest parsing and extraction | core | active |
| `pkg/generator` | Helm chart generation (12+ generators) | core | active |
| `pkg/processor` | Per-resource-type processors (35+ types) | core | active |
| `pkg/helm` | Helm chart structures (Chart.yaml, values.yaml) | core | active |
| `pkg/types` | Shared domain types | core | active |
| `pkg/testutil` | Test utilities and fixtures | testing | active |
| `tests/integration` | Integration test suite (10 scenarios) | testing | active |
| `tests/e2e` | E2E tests with Helm lint/template | testing | active |

### Key Interactions

```
CLI (cmd/dhg)
  └─► Generator.Generate(options)
        ├─► Extractor.Extract(manifests) → []Resource
        ├─► Analyzer.Analyze(resources) → AnalysisResult
        │     └─► Processor.Process(resource) → ProcessedResource
        │           └─► Detectors (annotation, deckhouse, label, reference, volume)
        └─► Generator variants (Universal/Separate/Library/Umbrella)
              └─► Phase 2 generators (airgap, namespace, networkpolicy, multitenant,
                   featureflags, cloudannotations, ingressdetect, monorepo, spot,
                   kustomize, autodeps)
```

## 3. Decisions (ADR Log)

| ID | Date | Decision | Status | Context |
|----|------|----------|--------|---------|
| ADR-001 | 2026-02-26 | Go 1.24 + Cobra CLI framework | Accepted | Standard for K8s ecosystem tooling |
| ADR-002 | 2026-02-26 | GoReleaser for distribution (GitHub Releases + GHCR + Homebrew) | Accepted | Multi-platform binary distribution |
| ADR-003 | 2026-02-26 | Plugin-style processor registry per resource type | Accepted | 35+ resource types need isolated processing |
| ADR-004 | 2026-02-26 | TDD approach for Phase 2 generators | Accepted | Tests written first, then implementation |
| ADR-005 | 2026-02-27 | Phase 2 split into 3 tiers (Infra / Detection / Advanced) | Accepted | Manageable incremental delivery |
| ADR-006 | 2026-03-27 | Release v0.7.0 with known findings tracked in #29 | Accepted | 0 critical-security, 71 findings for v0.7.1 |

## 4. Constraints

| Constraint | Type | Impact | Mitigation |
|------------|------|--------|------------|
| Go 1.24 minimum | Technical | Library compatibility | Pin in go.mod |
| Coverage gate 70% | Quality | Blocks CI on regressions | Current: 86% |
| No K8s cluster required for generation | Design | Air-gapped support | Use --airgap-registry flag |
| Deckhouse module compatibility | Domain | Scaffold must match Deckhouse conventions | Processor/k8s covers 35+ Deckhouse types |

## 5. Principles

1. **Resource-type isolation**: each K8s resource type has its own processor — no shared mutable state
2. **TDD for new generators**: write tests first, then implement (established in Phase 2)
3. **Backward compatibility**: new CLI flags are additive, never breaking
4. **Coverage gate enforced**: 70% minimum, target 86%+

## Type-Specific Extensions

<!-- ARCHITECTURE Extension: development -->

## 7. C4 Model

### Level 1: System Context

```
[Developer] ──CLI──► [dhg binary]
                          │
                          ├── reads ──► [K8s YAML manifests]
                          └── writes ──► [Helm chart output dir]
```

### Level 2: Container Diagram

| Container | Technology | Purpose | Communication |
|-----------|-----------|---------|---------------|
| dhg CLI | Go 1.24, Cobra | Command parsing, orchestration | stdin/stdout/files |
| Extractor | Go | Parse K8s YAML, build Resource list | in-process |
| Analyzer | Go | Detect patterns, relationships | in-process |
| Generator | Go | Produce Helm chart files | in-process → filesystem |
| Processor Registry | Go | 35+ K8s type processors | in-process |

### Level 3: Component Diagram

Phase 2 generator composition (all called from `generator.go`):
- Core: universal, separate, library, umbrella, grouping, dependencies, envvalues, globalvalues, openapi, modulescaffold, checksum, apimigration
- Tier 1: airgap, namespace, networkpolicy, multitenant
- Tier 2: featureflags, cloudannotations, ingressdetect
- Tier 3: monorepo, spot, kustomize, autodeps

## 8. Module Dependencies

| Module | Dependencies | Dependents | Coupling |
|--------|-------------|-----------|----------|
| `pkg/types` | stdlib | all packages | Low |
| `pkg/helm` | `pkg/types` | `pkg/generator` | Low |
| `pkg/extractor` | `pkg/types` | `pkg/generator`, `cmd/dhg` | Medium |
| `pkg/analyzer` | `pkg/types`, `pkg/processor` | `pkg/generator`, `cmd/dhg` | Medium |
| `pkg/processor` | `pkg/types`, `pkg/helm` | `pkg/analyzer`, `pkg/generator` | High |
| `pkg/generator` | all pkg/* | `cmd/dhg` | High |
| `cmd/dhg` | `pkg/generator`, `pkg/extractor`, `pkg/analyzer` | — | Entry point |

## 9. API Contracts

### Internal APIs (key interfaces)

| Interface | Package | Key Methods |
|-----------|---------|-------------|
| `Generator` | `pkg/generator` | `Generate(opts Options) error` |
| `Extractor` | `pkg/extractor` | `Extract(path string) ([]Resource, error)` |
| `Analyzer` | `pkg/analyzer` | `Analyze(resources []Resource) AnalysisResult` |
| `Processor` | `pkg/processor` | `Process(resource Resource) ProcessedResource` |

### External Integrations

| Service | Protocol | Auth | Notes |
|---------|----------|------|-------|
| GitHub Releases | REST | GITHUB_TOKEN | GoReleaser publishes binaries |
| GHCR | OCI | GITHUB_TOKEN | Docker image distribution |
| Homebrew tap | git | GITHUB_TOKEN | Homebrew formula update |

## 10. Database Schema

Not applicable — dhg is a stateless CLI tool. No persistent storage.

## 11. CI/CD Pipeline

### Pipeline Stages

| Stage | Tool | Trigger | Gate |
|-------|------|---------|------|
| Lint | golangci-lint | PR | Block on error |
| Unit tests | go test | PR | Block on fail |
| Integration tests | go test ./tests/integration/... | PR | Block on fail |
| E2E tests | go test ./tests/e2e/... + helm | PR | Block on fail |
| Security scan | gitleaks + Trivy + CodeQL | PR + push | Block on critical |
| Coverage gate | go test -coverprofile | PR | Block if < 70% |
| Release | GoReleaser | tag push | Publish binaries |

### Branch Strategy

GitHub flow: feature branches → PR → main. Release via git tag.

## 12. Environments

| Environment | Purpose | Infra | Notes |
|-------------|---------|-------|-------|
| local | Development | Go toolchain + Helm | `make build && ./bin/dhg` |
| CI | Testing | GitHub Actions | All stages per PR |
| release | Distribution | GoReleaser + GHCR | On `v*` tag push |
